creator: jeroen.pulles@gmail.com
text:
MySQL 8.0.20 is available and fixes multiple CVE's 

https://www.oracle.com/security-alerts/cpuapr2020.html#AppendixMSQL

https://dev.mysql.com/doc/relnotes/mysql/8.0/en/news-8-0-20.html#mysqld-8-0-20-bug

"On FreeBSD, the krb5 package is a now a dependency. (Bug #30887620)"
